title: News | Chris Kane MP
meta_description: Keep updated on the latest news, campaigns and my work on behalf of constituents in the local area.

text_excerpt: News | Chris Kane MP >>>>>>>>> (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) >>>>>>>>> End (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) Find me on Facebook 01786 652345 Email Us HOME ABOUT NEWS NEWSLETTER CONTACT Online Form Coffee Mornings Visit Parliament Event Request Useful Links SUPERSTARS OPPORTUNITIES LATEST NEWS Keep updated on the latest news, campaigns and my work on behalf of voters in Stirling and Strathallan. News UK Government Delivers £4.6m Support for Heating‑Oil Households in Scotland Rural and off‑gas‑grid communities across Stirling and Strathallan continue to face soaring heating‑oil costs. Chris has been leading calls in Parliament and beyond to secure urgent support for affected households. Read More » Chris Kane MP 17/03/2026 News Chris Raises Heating Oil Price Surge in Parliament to Support Rural Scots Chris has raised urgent questions in Parliament following the sharp rise in heating oil prices affecting rural and off‑gas‑grid households across Scotland. Read More » Chris Kane MP 10/03/2026 News Chris Visits Killin Following Water Supply Issues Yesterday, Chris met with representatives from SEPA, Scottish Water, and residents in Killin to discuss the ongoing situation with the village’s water supply. Read More » Chris Kane MP 25/02/2026 News £10,000 Grants Available for Armed Forces Day Celebrations Chris has welcomed the opening of new UK Government grants of up to £10,000 to support local Armed Forces Day events in 2026. Read More » Chris Kane MP 24/02/2026 News £9.8 Million Boost for Forth Valley Through UK Government Local Growth Fund Chris has welcomed the announcement of a major investment, £9.8 million, in the Forth Valley region as part of the UK Government’s new Scottish Local Growth Fund. Read More » Chris Kane MP 08/01/2026 News Merry Christmas Thank you to everyone in Stirling and Strathallan who has engaged with me throughout 2025. Every email, phone call, letter, and event invitation helps me better represent you in Westminster. Read More » Chris Kane MP 22/12/2025 News How the Autumn Budget Delivers for Stirling & Strathallan Yesterday’s UK Budget was one of the most significant in recent years, setting out plans to tackle the cost of living, invest in jobs and skills, and unlock Scotland’s potential. For families in Stirling & Strathallan, this is a Budget that delivers real, tangible benefits. Read More » Chris Kane MP 27/11/2025 News Chris Kane: “Further Education must be prioritised” In Chris’s monthly Stirling Observer column, he calls for further education to be prioritised, as Forth Valley College announces its plans to shut its Alloa Campus. Read More » Chris Kane MP 16/10/2025 Load More Subscribe to Chris's Newsletter GET IN TOUCH I can help constituents with various issues, such as benefits, employment law, energy policy, taxation, and visas. Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your name, address and full details of your issue. Additionally, use this form to access details about our online and in-person surgery events. In my role as your elected representative, I also want to engage with voters, community groups and local organisations to foster dialogue, promote community interests, and encourage representation on issues that matter to you. The page here lets you easily invite me to attend local events or gatherings at Parliament. Whether you’re organising a community meeting, charity event, or a local celebration, you can use the form to invite me to the event and ensure your community’s voice is heard. 01786 652345 chris.kane.mp@parliament.uk Phone Number * Please select I have a local issue. I have a policy enquiry. I would like Chris to attend an event. I would like to visit Parliament Other I have read & agree to the Privacy Policy .
